name: context-mode
description_en: MCP plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Works with Claude Code, Gemini CLI, VS Code Copilot, OpenCode, and Codex CLI. Sandboxed code execution, FTS5 knowledge base, and intent-driven search.
description_zh: MCP 插件，可节省 98% 的上下文窗口空间。与 Claude Code、Gemini CLI、VS Code Copilot、OpenCode 和 Codex CLI 协同工作。沙盒化代码执行、FTS5 知识库和意图驱动的搜索。
